org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.ReactiveResultSetExtractor

Packages that use ReactiveResultSetExtractor
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql
CQL core support.

  • Uses of ReactiveResultSetExtractor in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql

    Classes in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql that implement ReactiveResultSetExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ReactiveRowMapperResultSetExtractor<T>
    Adapter implementation of the ReactiveResultSetExtractor interface that delegates to a RowMapper which is supposed to create an object for each row.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql with parameters of type ReactiveResultSetExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> Flux<T>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.query(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.cql.Statement<?> statement, ReactiveResultSetExtractor<T> rse)
    Execute a query given static CQL, reading the ReactiveResultSet with a ReactiveResultSetExtractor.
    <T> Flux<T>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.query(String cql, @Nullable PreparedStatementBinder psb, ReactiveResultSetExtractor<T> rse)
    Query using a prepared statement, reading the ReactiveResultSet with a ReactiveResultSetExtractor.
    <T> Flux<T>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.query(String cql, ReactiveResultSetExtractor<T> rse)
    Execute a query given static CQL, reading the ReactiveResultSet with a ReactiveResultSetExtractor.
    <T> Flux<T>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.query(String cql, ReactiveResultSetExtractor<T> rse, Object... args)
    Query given CQL to create a prepared statement from CQL and a list of arguments to bind to the query, reading the ReactiveResultSet with a ReactiveResultSetExtractor.
    <T> Flux<T>
    ReactiveCqlOperations.query(ReactivePreparedStatementCreator psc, @Nullable PreparedStatementBinder psb, ReactiveResultSetExtractor<T> rse)
    Query using a prepared statement and a PreparedStatementBinder implementation that knows how to bind values to the query, reading the ReactiveResultSet with a ResultSetExtractor.

    Query using a prepared statement, reading the ReactiveResultSet with a ReactiveResultSetExtractor.
